历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 288 → 10372 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 783 → 828 → 776; excluding the abnormal value in 2022, the rankings from 2023 to 2025 fluctuated narrowly between 776 and 828, with a baseline of about 776 in 2025; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 5 in 2021 → 7 in 2022 → 4 in 2023 → 9 in 2024 → 11 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 12, an increase of 1 (+9.1%) compared to 2025, and the continuous expansion slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, 13th in 2021 → 17th in 2022 → stable at 19th from 2023 to 2026, recently stable in the Top 20, belonging to top comprehensive normal universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, the school actively clarifies online rumors, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), short videos mainly feature positive content such as 'the highest institution of normal education'; regarding historical admission anomalies, the admission ranking in Jiangxi Province dropped significantly in 2022, but it is an individual case in other provinces with limited impact on Qinghai Province; Education A+, Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Physics A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Statistics A, Geography A+, etc., with a total of 18 A- and above; the physics category enrollment majors (Science Experimental Class, Physics Class, Mathematics Class, Social Science Experimental Class) are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines such as Mathematics A, Physics A-, Statistics A, and Environmental Science and Engineering A.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended, Mathematics/Statistics majors are recommended, Normal/Education majors are differentiated and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is approximately 30,672 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight increase of about 0.7% from 30,457 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to candidates from western provinces; Qinghai Province is a western province, candidates have a strong willingness to study in Beijing, but the enrollment scale is small (11–12 people), and ranking fluctuations are easily affected by individual high-scoring candidates' application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of rankings between 776 and 828 from 2023 to 2025, the 9.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the slight increase in physics category examinees in the province, combined with the school's top reputation, the appeal of advantageous disciplines, and relatively high Douyin attention, competition is expected to slightly intensify; the predicted minimum ranking is about 828, with a range of 734 to 922.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 83 → 80 → 80 → 80 → 111. It remained stable around 80 from 2021 to 2024, but shifted to 111 in 2025 due to the new college entrance examination reform (History Category), moving back about 31 ranks in the past year. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 111. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 5 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 6 students, an increase of 1 (+20%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition, but the ranking numbers still show an increasing trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking: 13th in 2021 → 17th in 2022 → stable at 19th from 2023 to 2026, consistently in the Top 20 in recent years, belonging to top-tier normal universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; the school actively clarified online rumors (such as the 'eating leftovers' incident) with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with short videos mainly featuring positive content like 'the highest institution of teacher education,' and application attention is moderately high. Regarding historical admission anomalies, the admission ranking in Jiangxi Province dropped significantly in 2022, but this was an out-of-province case with limited impact on Qinghai Province. It has 6 A+ disciplines: Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory, with a total of 18 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating top-tier academic strength. The History Category enrollment majors (Humanities Experimental Class, History Class) are highly correlated with the A+ disciplines of Chinese History and Chinese Language and Literature, making them highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher/education majors significantly increased in 2022, then slightly cooled in 2023–2024, showing a divergent and wait-and-see trend in 2025, but top-tier normal universities remain attractive. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in this province is approximately 17,328 (estimated based on historical proportion), a slight increase of about 0.7% from 17,212 in 2025, intensifying competition slightly. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from western provinces. Qinghai Province is a western province, and candidates have a strong willingness to study in Beijing, but the enrollment scale is very small (5–6 students), making ranking fluctuations easily affected by individual high-scoring candidates' application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the slight increase in History Category candidates in this province, combined with the school's top reputation, advantageous discipline appeal, and relatively high Douyin attention, competition is expected to intensify slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 130, with a range of 80–180.
